summary: Dashboard project with order management features. Dashboard was working in v154 but broke in v155/v156 due to reconciliation fix. Now implementing Batch 3 (Display layout: grouped design code rows with expandable suborders, ageing badges, karigar name, order type badge, image modal) and Batch 4 (Filters and Search: search by design code/order number/generic name, RB/CO/SO filter + karigar filter across Total Orders/Ready/Hallmark tabs).
architectural_notes: Dashboard was working in v154; v155 reconciliation fix caused a loading regression that persisted through v156
known_issues: Dashboard fails to load after v155 reconciliation fix; root cause not yet identified

existing_features.title: In the Total Orders tab (TotalOrdersTab.tsx), group pending orders by design code. Each design code group displays a single header row showing: design code (clickable), order type badge (RB/CO/SO), karigar name, total sub-order count, total qty, and total weight. The group row has a chevron toggle to expand/collapse its sub-orders. Sub-order rows show: order number, qty, weight, generic name, order date, and an ageing badge (days since order date, colour-coded: green ≤14d, amber 15–29d, red ≥30d). A checkbox on the group row selects all its sub-orders; individual sub-order checkboxes also work. The Mark as Ready action continues to work on selected sub-orders.

Apply the same grouped design code layout (expandable sub-orders, ageing badges, karigar name, order type badge) to the Ready tab (ReadyTab.tsx) and the Hallmark tab (HallmarkTab.tsx), preserving their existing actions (return to pending for Ready; mark as returned for Hallmark).

When the user clicks a design code in any group header row (Total Orders, Ready, Hallmark tabs), open the existing DesignImageModal for that design code, showing the associated design image with zoom/pan support.

Add a search bar and two filter dropdowns (order type: All Types / RB / CO / SO; karigar: All Karigars / <list of karigars>) above the orders table in the Total Orders, Ready, and Hallmark tabs. The search input filters rows by design code, order number, or generic name (case-insensitive, partial match). The order type dropdown filters to show only groups matching the selected type. The karigar dropdown filters to show only groups assigned to the selected karigar. All three controls work together (AND logic). Match the UI shown in the uploaded screenshot: search bar on the left, two pill/capsule dropdowns on the right.

new_feature_requests.summary: Batch 3 - Display layout: grouped design code rows with expandable suborders, ageing badges, karigar name, order type badge, image modal on design code click
Batch 4 - Filters and Search: search by design code, order number, generic name; RB/CO/SO filter + karigar filter across Total Orders, Ready, Hallmark tabs
